data.content:
The user wants a summary of the highlights from NVIDIA's GTC (GPU Technology Conference). GTC is NVIDIA's annual developer conference where they announce new products, research, and AI innovations.

Let me search for the latest GTC highlights to provide an up-to-date summary.
I'll research the latest NVIDIA GTC highlights for you.

args.query: NVIDIA GTC March 2026 new products Blackwell

{"prompt": "Extract key product announcements, new GPUs, Blackwell, Rubin, Vera Rubin, Dynamo, and other major highlights from this GTC 2026 coverage", "url": "https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/16/nvidia-gtc-2026-ceo-jensen-huang-keynote-blackwell-vera-rubin.html"}

args.prompt: Extract all key announcements, product launches, and highlights from this GTC 2026 keynote coverage
Extract key product announcements, new GPUs, Blackwell, Rubin, Vera Rubin, Dynamo, and other major highlights from this GTC 2026 coverage

data.content:
## Key Product Announcements and Highlights from GTC 2026

### Financial Outlook
- **$1 trillion in orders** expected for Blackwell and Vera Rubin systems through 2027 (up from $500 billion projection last year)
- Q1 revenue expected to surge **77% year-over-year** to approximately $78 billion
- **11 straight quarters** of revenue growth above 55%

---

### New GPUs & Hardware

#### **Vera Rubin System**
- Rolling out later in 2026
- Composed of **1.3 million components**
- Delivers **10x more performance per watt** than Grace Blackwell
- Shipping to customers later this year

#### **Groq 3 LPU (Language Processing Unit)**
- Nvidia's first chip from the startup acquired through **$20 billion purchase** in December (largest deal ever)
- Founded by creators of Google's in-house tensor processing unit
- Expected to ship in **Q3 2026**

#### **Groq 3 LPX Rack**
- Holds **256 LPUs**
- Can increase tokens per watt performance of Rubin GPUs by **35 times**
- Designed to sit beside Vera Rubin rack-scale system

#### **Kyber (Next-Gen Architecture Prototype)**
- Integrates **144 GPUs** in vertically-oriented compute trays
- Boosts density and lowers latency
- Available in **Vera Rubin Ultra**, expected **2027**

---

### Software & AI Developments

#### **OpenClaw / NemoClaw**
- OpenClaw launched January 2026 by Austrian developer Peter Steinberger (now at OpenAI)
- Introduced **NemoClaw** - developer toolkit/reference stack to make OpenClaw "enterprise ready"

#### **Agentic AI Theme**
- Central theme at GTC: Agentic AI driving fundamental shift in computing needs
- Token generation exploding as AI shifts from chatbots to autonomous agentic apps

---

### Automotive Announcements

- **Uber**: Launching autonomous fleet across **28 cities in 4 continents by 2028**, starting with LA and SF in 2027
- **Level 4 autonomous vehicles**: Nissan, BYD, Geely, Isuzu, and Hyundai building on Nvidia's Drive Hyperion program
- **Autonomous buses**: Isuzu and China's Tier IV using Nvidia's AGX Thor robotic system chip

---

### Company Valuation
- Nvidia remains the world's most valuable public company at approximately **$4.5 trillion**

# GTC 2026 Key Announcements, Product Launches & Highlights

## Jensen Huang Keynote Highlights

### Major Milestones & Strategy
- **20th anniversary of CUDA** - described as the "flywheel" driving accelerated computing
- **$1 trillion in revenue projected** from 2025-2027
- **Computing demand increased 1 million times** over the last few years
- Conference stats: 450+ sponsors, 1,000 sessions, 2,000 speakers

### DLSS 5
- Launched with 3D-guided neural rendering for real-time, photoreal 4K performance on local hardware

---

## New Hardware Platforms

### Vera Rubin Platform
- **Full-stack computing platform** comprising 7 chips, 5 rack-scale systems, and 1 supercomputer for agentic AI
- Includes **NVIDIA Vera CPU** and **BlueField-4 STX** storage architecture
- Described as "vertically integrated, complete with software, extended end to end"

### Vera Rubin DSX AI Factory Reference Design
- Includes **DSX Air** for simulating AI factories in software before physical building

### Feynman Architecture (Next Generation)
- **NVIDIA Rosa CPU** (named for Rosalind Franklin)
- **LP40** - next-generation LPU
- **BlueField-5** and **CX10** components
- **NVIDIA Kyber** for copper and co-packaged optics scale-up
- **Spectrum-class** optical scale-out networking

### Space Computing
- **NVIDIA Space-1 Vera Rubin** - AI data centers in orbit (going to space)

---

## AI & Agentic AI Announcements

### OpenClaw Support
- NVIDIA supporting **OpenClaw** across its platform
- Described as "the most popular open source project in the history of humanity"

### NVIDIA NemoClaw Stack
- Open source stack for running always-on OpenClaw assistants
- Combines policy enforcement, network guardrails, and privacy routing
- Serves as "the policy engine of all the SaaS companies in the world"

### NVIDIA OpenShell Runtime
- Secure environment for running autonomous agents

### Nemotron Coalition
Six frontier model families:
1. **NVIDIA Nemotron** - language and reasoning
2. **NVIDIA Cosmos** - world and vision
3. **NVIDIA Isaac GR00T** - general-purpose robotics
4. **NVIDIA Alpaymayo** - autonomous driving
5. **NVIDIA BioNeMo** - biology and chemistry
6. **NVIDIA Earth-2** - weather and climate

---

## Workstation Announcements

### DGX Spark
- Scalable AI infrastructure for enterprise teams
- Supports clustering up to 4 systems (desktop data center)
- Supports latest AI models including NVIDIA Nemotron 3

### DGX Station
- **World's most powerful deskside supercomputer**
- Powered by **NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Desktop Superchip**
- **748 gigabytes** of coherent memory
- **Up to 20 petaflops** of AI compute performance
- 72-core NVIDIA Grace CPU + NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GPU via NVLink-C2C
- Run open models up to **1 trillion parameters**
- Available from ASUS, Dell Technologies, GIGABYTE, MSI, Supermicro (HP later)

### NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition
- **100x performance** for vision AI vs CPU-only servers
- **Up to 50x performance** for vector databases
- 165-watt, single-slot form factor
- 5th-gen Tensor Cores, 4th-gen RTX technology
- **10x performance boost** for Nemotron Nano 9B vs NVIDIA L4
- **5x faster query performance** for Apache Spark with cuDF
- Available from Cisco, Dell, HPE, Lenovo, Supermicro, and others

### Partner Workstations
- **Lenovo**: ThinkPad P series mobile workstations, ThinkStation P5 Gen 2
- **Dell**: Dell Pro Precision 5 and 7 Series mobile, Precision 9 T2/T4/T6 desktops
- **HP**: Z desktop workstations (future GPU generations)

---

## Cloud & Partnership Announcements

### NVIDIA + AWS
- **Expanded partnership** deploying 1 million+ NVIDIA GPUs
- Deployments spanning Blackwell and Rubin GPU architectures
- **AWS first cloud provider** to support RTX PRO 4500
- NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 3 on Amazon Bedrock for Salesforce Agentforce
- Reinforcement fine-tuning coming to Bedrock

### NVIDIA + Microsoft
- **Microsoft Foundry** integration with NVIDIA open models
- Azure liquid-cooled with hundreds of thousands of Grace Blackwell GPUs
- Azure first hyperscale cloud to power **Vera Rubin NVL72 systems**
- NVIDIA Nemotron on Azure as managed API service (later 2026)

### NVIDIA + Oracle
- **Oracle Private AI Services Container** supporting NVIDIA GPUs and cuVS
- **OCI Supercluster with Vera Rubin**

### NVIDIA Cloud Partners (NCP)
- **Doubled AI factory footprint** year over year
- **1 million+ NVIDIA GPUs** cumulatively deployed
- **1.7 gigawatts** of AI capacity
- Partners include TechQuartier, Zadara, DDN, YTL, SOOFI

---

## Physical AI Announcements

### NVIDIA IGX Thor (Generally Available)
- Industrial-grade platform for real-time physical AI at the edge
- Partners: Caterpillar, Hitachi Rail, KION Group, Agility, Hexagon Robotics, Johnson & Johnson, KARL STORZ, Medtronic, LEM Surgical, Planet Labs, CERN

### Robotaxi Platform Expansion
- New automaker partners: **BYD, Hyundai, Nissan, Geely**
- **Uber partnership** for ride-hailing deployment

### Industrial & Robotics Partnerships
- **ABB, Universal Robots, KUKA** for manufacturing lines
- **T-Mobile** as base stations evolve into edge AI platforms
- Ecosystem partners: Analog Devices, Infineon, NXP, STMicroelectronics, Texas Instruments

---

## Healthcare Announcements

### Healthcare Robotics Tools
- **Open-H**: World's largest healthcare robotics dataset (~700+ hours of surgical video)
- **Cosmos-H**: Physics-based synthetic data generation for surgery
- **GR00T-H**: Vision language action (VLA) model for clinical tasks
- **Rheo**: Developer blueprint for hospital environment simulation
- Partners: CMR Surgical, Johnson & Johnson MedTech, Moon Surgical, Rob Surgical, PeritasAI, Proximie

### Protein & Genomic Announcements
- **AlphaFold Protein Structure Database expansion**: 1.7 million new predicted protein complexes
- **30 million additional structures** available for bulk download
- 100x faster inference via NVIDIA TensorRT and cuEquivariance

### BioNeMo Platform
- **Basecamp Research's Trillion Gene Atlas (TGA)**: 100x expansion of BaseData
- **Tahoe-100M**: World's largest individual single-cell dataset (100M cells)
- **PerturbAI**: 8 million brain-wide cells CRISPR functional genomics atlas

### Digital Health Agents
- Nemotron models for healthcare (Heidi Health, Hippocratic AI, Sword Health, IQVIA, OpenEvidence, Verily)

---

## Financial Services Announcements

### Infrastructure
- **Jump Trading**: Among first trading firms to adopt NVIDIA Rubin platform
- **Hudson River Trading**: AI Factory in Norway using Blackwell + Spectrum-X
- 1.6x improvement in research iteration time vs Hopper architecture

### Transaction Foundation Models
- **Mastercard**: Proprietary transaction foundation model on Databricks
- **Revolut**: 20% increase in fraud detection precision
- **Adyen**: 195x speedup for foundation model inference ($1 trillion in payments)

---

## Retail Announcements

### NVIDIA ALCHEMI for L'Oréal
- **100x faster** molecular screening for sun protection
- Applied to skincare formulation discovery

### Retail Agentic Commerce Blueprint
- Open source reference architecture for agent-to-agent commerce
- Supports **OpenAI's Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP)** and **Google's Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)**
- Four agents: promotion pricing, recommendations, semantic search, multilingual messaging

---

## Media & Entertainment Announcements

### Holoscan for Media
- Content localization capabilities (translation, dubbing, captions)
- Partners: AI Media, Camb.AI, Chyron, Onemeta-Verbum, Panjaya

### NVIDIA AI for Media SDKs
- **Studio Voice**, **Active Speaker Detection**, **Video Super Resolution**

### Lenovo Multiyear Collaboration
- Sports intelligence, operations, and media/content AI solutions

---

## Quantum & Research Announcements

### NVIDIA cuEST (Quantum Chemistry)
- Electronic-structure calculations on GPUs
- **Up to 30x speedup** for semiconductor workflows
- Partners: Applied Materials, Samsung, Synopsys, TSMC

### Data Processing
- **cuDF and cuVS adoption** by Google Cloud, Snap (76% cost reduction), IBM watsonx.data, Oracle, Dell

---

## Build-a-Claw Event
- Hands-on experience creating AI agents using OpenClaw
- March 16-19 at GTC Park
- Available on DGX Spark and GeForce RTX laptops
The user wants to focus on the speaker list at NVIDIA GTC 2026. Let me search for more specific information about the speakers at the conference.

## Speakers at GTC 2026

### Keynote Speaker

*Keynote scheduled for Monday, March 16, at 11 a.m. PT at SAP Center*

---

### GTC Live Keynote Pregame Show Speakers (Monday, March 16, 8 a.m. PT)
| Name | Title | Company |
|------|-------|---------|
| **Aravind Srinivas** | CEO | Perplexity |
| **Harrison Chase** | CEO | LangChain |
| **Deepak Pathak** | CEO | Skild AI |

---

### Featured Discussion: Open Frontier Models
Jensen Huang will host a discussion with industry leaders from:
- **A16Z**
- **AI2**
- **AMP Coalition**
- **Black Forest Labs**
- **Cursor**
- **Reflection AI**
- **Thinking Machines Lab**

*(Note: Individual names from these organizations were not specified in this press release)*

---

### Participating Organizations
The press release lists the following organizations with representatives:
Adobe, Agile Robots, Agility, AI2, AMP Coalition, Black Forest Labs, Canva, CodeRabbit, Cohere, Crusoe Energy Systems, Cursor, Dassault Systèmes, Decagon, General Motors, Genspark, Google DeepMind, Hugging Face, IBM Research, idealworks, Inception Labs, Johnson & Johnson, Kimi (Moonshot AI), L'Oréal, Lucid Motors, Magic AI, Meta, Microsoft, OpenAI, Poolside, Physical Intelligence, Reflection AI, Runway, Siemens, Shopify, Snap, Tesla, Together AI, Thinking Machines Lab, Uber Technologies, Universal Robots, U.S. Department of Energy, and Vention.

## Speakers and Presenters at GTC 2026

Based on the provided webpage content, here is a comprehensive list of speakers, presenters, and notable figures mentioned at GTC 2026:

### **Keynote Speaker**
- **Jensen Huang** — NVIDIA Founder and CEO

#### **Agentic AI Panel**

#### **Physical AI Panel**

### **Notable Executives and Leaders Mentioned**

- **Geely** — New automaker partner

#### **Healthcare & Life Sciences**

- **Rob Surgical** — Surgical robotics

#### **Cloud & Technology**

This list includes individuals and companies explicitly named in the live blog coverage. The page mentions "2,000 speakers" and "1,000 sessions" at GTC 2026, suggesting many more presenters exist beyond those detailed in this coverage.

## NVIDIA GTC 2026 — Speaker Highlights

**NVIDIA GTC 2026** kicked off March 16 at the SAP Center in San Jose, running through March 20. The conference features **1,000+ sessions** and **2,000+ speakers** across the AI stack.

---

### Keynote

|---------|-------|-------------|
| **Jensen Huang** | Founder & CEO | NVIDIA |

| **Tiffany Janzen** | Correspondent / Founder | TiffinTech |

BYD, Hyundai/Kia, Nissan, Geely, Isuzu, Lucid Motors, General Motors — all expanding on NVIDIA Drive Hyperion for Level 4 autonomous vehicles.

Adobe, AI2, Black Forest Labs, Canva, Cohere, Cursor, Google DeepMind, Hugging Face, IBM Research, Meta, Microsoft, OpenAI, Siemens, Snap, Tesla, Together AI, Thinking Machines Lab, U.S. DOE, and many more across **accelerated computing, agentic AI, physical AI, healthcare, and cloud infrastructure**.
